pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer transformer pairs a 3.5x LeakyReLU MLP+SmearGate/ValueRes/XSA stack with late Muon schedule and int6 GPTQ-lite quantization for public leaderboard runs.
techniques: MLP 3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 with SmearGate, Value Residual, Gated Attention, XSA and hash-based tokenization
Muon optimizer schedule with warmdown, EMA, and late QAT via STE
Int6 uniform GPTQ-lite quantization with zstd-22 compression
